scenes.visual_direction: Sunrise/morning over a timber-frame house under construction in a green field; builders arriving with tools in warm light; welcoming, aspirational
Two builders talking calmly about the work on site — over timber, by a frame, pointing at the structure; friendly pair, African workers preferred
A foreman or master builder showing an apprentice how to do something — demonstrating a cut, guiding hands, apprentice watching closely

clips.author: Unknown authorUnknown author or not provided

scenes.visual_direction: A single dignified builder — calm confident portrait at work, inspecting finished work with pride, warm light; African workers preferred
A young builder watching carefully then trying — observing a technique, studying the work, hands-on learning on site

clips.author: Robert Cutts from Bristol, England, UK

scenes.visual_direction: A worker walking across the site to a colleague/foreman for a quick word; showing progress on the structure; brief and friendly
Two builders inspecting an issue together — checking a level, re-measuring a beam, heads together over the work
Close dignified hands at builder craft — hammering a nail, sawing, driving a screw, laying a brick with a trowel
A small building crew working together — lifting a beam as a pair, raising a frame wall, passing materials; cooperative, positive

clips.author: 英雄本色 A Better Tomorrow & A Better Tomorrow II (English Dubbed)

scenes.visual_direction: A builder caring for tools — cleaning a saw/trowel, sharpening a chisel, hanging tools neatly on a workshop wall; ordered workbench
Golden-hour on the building site — finished timber frame at sunset, builder silhouette packing up, warm light through the structure; hopeful
